sub_fields.label: Add Additional Text
sub_fields.name: add_additional_text
sub_fields.message: Click here to add additional text below button.

sub_fields.label: Form Code
sub_fields.name: form_code
sub_fields.instructions: Form is generated in Commerce7 - to make edits to fields visit: Here

sub_fields.label: Add Heading
sub_fields.name: add_heading
sub_fields.message: Click here to add a heading for the entire section.

sub_fields.label: Add Section Button
sub_fields.name: add_section_button
sub_fields.message: Click here to add a button below the entire section.

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: To select multiple non-adjacent items use Command (⌘) for mac or Ctrl on a pc. Use Shift key to select multiple adjacent items.

sub_fields.label: Message
sub_fields.message: To update the the map, publish a new image following the instructions for the "Standalone version" here: https://imagemappro.com/docs/publishing-your-image. Send the generated code to requests@roostergrin.com.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Don't add the instagram handle here, it's autogenerated based on the instagram link in GlobalData > global > social_media

sub_fields.label: Instagram Feed Instructions
sub_fields.message: The Instagram feed is pulled from the Smash Balloon plugin - to update the account that the feed pulls from use the "Instagram Feed" link in the left menu.

sub_fields.label: Message
sub_fields.message: To update the map colors, marker, etc please contact requests@roostergrin.com.

sub_fields.label: Bio Paragraphs
sub_fields.name: bio_paragraphs
sub_fields.instructions: In order to make the design and the read more button work add new paragraphs using the Add New Paragraph button rather than adding multiple paragraphs in one "Paragraph" field.

sub_fields.label: Assets
sub_fields.name: assets
sub_fields.instructions: If adding an email link, make sure in the href field you add "mailto:" - (mailto:example@email.com)

sub_fields.label: Wine Item
sub_fields.name: wine
sub_fields.message: Click here to add multiple links per row.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Add the commerce7 slug for the wine you want to display.

sub_fields.label: Message
sub_fields.message: The wine product data is being fetched from Commerce7. To update details for these products use the Commerce7 dashboard.

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions:

This layout is intended to only be used on policy pages.
